title: Cobblemon Wilds
description: A Cobblemon modpack for Minecraft, enhancing exploration, battles, and adventure with complementary mods.
body:
Embark on an exciting journey in a world where Pokémon meet Minecraft! Enhances your gameplay experience by seamlessly integrating Pokémon-inspired mechanics into the vanilla world.

Main Features:
- Radical Red Trainers – Face off against challenging AI trainers inspired by Radical Red, testing your skills in intense battles.
- CobblemonRider – Ride your Pokémon across the world for faster travel and a true adventure experience.
- SimpleTMs – Equip your Pokémon with new moves using an easy and intuitive TM system.
- Legends Untold: Reborn – Discover hidden legendaries with unique mechanics and thrilling challenges.
- Enhanced Visuals – Powered by Iris Shaders, featuring animated Pokémon models, improved textures, and vibrant environments.
- Quality of Life Mods – Enjoy better UI, inventory management, and performance improvements to make gameplay smoother.
